questions.question: What is the primary reason for optimizing IP for IoT networks?
options: C) To enhance scalability and performance
questions.explanation: Optimizing IP for IoT networks is crucial to enhance scalability and performance, as IoT devices generate vast amounts of data and require efficient communication protocols.

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a compliance requirement for IoT networks?
questions.explanation: Intellectual property protection is not a direct compliance requirement for IoT networks, although it is an important consideration for device manufacturers and network operators.

questions.question: What is the primary benefit of using IP as the IoT network layer?
questions.explanation: IP provides enhanced scalability and performance, making it an ideal choice for IoT networks that require efficient communication protocols to manage vast amounts of data.

questions.question: Which of the following IoT network types is best suited for real-time applications?
questions.explanation: All three types of IoT networks (M2M, Device-to-Device, and Device-to-Cloud) can support real-time applications, but Device-to-Cloud is particularly well-suited for this purpose due to its ability to handle large amounts of data.

questions.question: Why is IP optimization crucial for IoT networks?
options: C) To enhance scalability and performance
questions.explanation: IP optimization is crucial for IoT networks because it enables them to handle the vast amounts of data generated by IoT devices, ensuring efficient communication protocols and reliable data transmission.
